full_text:
Jiao Bo
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiao Bo. Bodyguard of Cao Mao, he was slain by Cheng Ji while trying to protect his lord. Jiao Bo is a fictional character. Jiao Bo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
